summary: Comprehensive regression + new-feature pass for the TokenRoadmap (landing) and MainnetSignRehearsal (admin) additions. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed (1 skipped — solana-indexer/status now auth-gated). Frontend: TokenRoadmap renders cleanly with 7 milestones, live treasury pill shows 'MAINNET · 0.001000 SOL'; squads-treasury milestone correctly flips to SHIPPED; rehearsal checklist toggle + localStorage persistence + reset all verified end-to-end. Squad address corrected to 'ud2btD6BPdif...' is reflected in /api/admin/treasury/squads-status, /api/admin/treasury/dashboard.squads, and all 3 deep-link buttons (transactions/home/members). Public /api/treasury/public-status is auth-free, lean, and does NOT leak any cosigner addresses.

console_warnings.message: TypeError: e is not a function in la.initialize (bundle.js:765543)
console_warnings.impact: Non-blocking. Same warning logged in iteration_jan_2026_phantom_sweep_perf_sparkline.json — a pre-existing SDK init quirk, NOT a regression.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/treasury.py public_treasury_status(): correctly returns ONLY 5 keys (configured/network/is_mainnet/vault_balance_sol/rpc_ok). Verified by negative-assertion test — phantom_cosigner / founder_cosigner / vault_pda / squad_address / members are all absent. Good defensive coding.

TokenRoadmap.tsx: live polling every 60s with proper interval cleanup (no memory leak). treasuryLive flag is computed from configured && rpc_ok — robust against partial/down RPC. All 7 milestones have unique data-testids; status badges and dots use semantic colors per state.

MainnetSignRehearsal.tsx: localStorage key is namespaced ('vibez:mainnet-sign-rehearsal:v1') — versioned, future-proof. Toggle/reset/persistence verified across reload. Reset button only renders when completed > 0 (sensible UX).
SquadsVaultCard deep-links open https://app.squads.so/squads/<addr>/{transactions|home|members} with target=_blank — correct fuchsia CTA for transactions, slate for home/members.

Squad address env (SQUADS_ADDRESS / SQUADS_VAULT_PDA) was correctly updated from 5jtHu... to ud2btD6BPdif... — backend service now returns the right address and frontend deep-links pick it up via the admin endpoint. No stale data anywhere.
Minor: PerfSparkline's top-3 list now naturally surfaces /api/treasury/public-status because it's polled every 60s — a positive side-effect, no action needed.
test_credentials: Admin: GlobalVibez_Founder_2025! / 2FA: 000000 — POST /api/admin/vault-auth body keys are {password, code} (NOT 'totp'); fixed in test file.
seed_data_creation: None — all reads against real Helius mainnet RPC + the vault PDA holding 0.001 SOL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All session features verified: (1) public /api/treasury/public-status is the lean, unauth, no-leak roadmap feed, (2) admin squads-status returns the corrected squad address ud2btD6BPdif..., (3) admin dashboard still includes the squads block + buckets, (4) sweep/perf/indexer/vault-auth regressions all green, (5) TokenRoadmap landing component renders 7 milestones with live pill, (6) MainnetSignRehearsal checklist persists across reload via localStorage key 'vibez:mainnet-sign-rehearsal:v1', (7) SquadsVaultCard deep-links to Squads UI with correct address. IMPORTANT: vault-auth payload uses key 'code', NOT 'totp'; sweep endpoints use 'old_wallet'/'new_wallet' as QUERY params (not JSON body). Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter_jan_2026_token_roadmap_rehearsal.py for next regression cycle.
